name: Cityworks Application Post Compromise Activities
description: Aims to detect post-compromise activities related to the exploitation of the Cityworks vulnerability (CVE-2025-0944). It focuses on identifying suspicious actions such as file manipulation, web shell deployment, and command execution within Cityworks directories. These activities are indicative of a threat actor maintaining persistence and further exploiting the compromised system.

rules.name: Suspicious Code Execution for File Upload
Possible Downloading of Backdoor via Powershell
Possible File Staging Related to Cityworks Directories

author: Shaun Galura & Gerardo III Jonieca
